proof_metric.primary_metric: Increase in direct booking revenue (or conversions from direct enquiries)
proof_metric.minimum_credible_improvement: 10% uplift in direct booking revenue or a 15% increase in enquiry-to-booking conversion

resistance.main_reason: Ongoing monthly cost becomes hard to justify relative to measurable uplift for a 25-unit property
resistance.secondary_reason: Unclear integration with our contact-only booking flow and ability to attribute revenue

required_outcomes: Weekly prioritized commercial actions that the small team can execute (pricing, offers, guest outreach)
Measurable uplift in direct enquiries-to-booking conversion or direct booking revenue within 3 months
Reliable compset alerts and pricing insight that lead to immediate yield improvements on peak dates
required_capabilities: PMS/CRM (or contact-form) integration to track enquiries and attribute direct revenue
Automated multilingual content engine for offers and guest communications in our target languages
Decision engine producing a succinct weekly action list (not dashboards) tailored to a 25-unit luxury property

no_brainer_5k.extra_value_required: White-glove onboarding, guaranteed integrations (PMS/CRM/contact tracking), and a short-term SLA tying part of fees to performance
non_negotiables: Swiss/GDPR-compliant data hosting and clear privacy controls
Seamless tracking of enquiries -> conversions for attribution
Dedicated account manager for the luxury account
sensitive_risks: Data privacy and residency concerns for high-net-worth client data
False pricing signals that could erode brand positioning
Over-automation that sacrifices personalised guest service
remaining_blockers: Owner sign-off on an ongoing monthly spend at CHF 5k
References from comparable luxury alpine properties in Switzerland
Proof of clean, low-effort integration with our contact-only booking process

module_c.deal_killer: No reliable integration to track enquiries and attribute direct bookings (i.e., inability to prove revenue uplift from the platform).

proof_metric.primary_metric: direct booking conversion rate (contact-to-confirmed booking) and attributable direct revenue
proof_metric.minimum_credible_improvement: 15% relative increase in direct booking conversion (or equivalent +CHF revenue from direct leads)

resistance.main_reason: Too high relative to demonstrable near-term incremental direct revenue
resistance.secondary_reason: Perceived overlap with existing agency work / internal efforts

required_outcomes: Measurable uplift in direct booking conversion / attributable direct revenue (≥15% within 6 months)
Clear, operational weekly commercial actions that save time and are executed by our small team
Actionable guest personas/segmentation enabling targeted upsell and tailored offers
required_capabilities: Live dashboard that aggregates competitor pricing, review sentiment and gives weekly recommended actions
Multilingual content engine to produce targeted commercial messaging in our five languages
Integrations or simple data import with our contact/booking workflow and CRM to attribute leads

no_brainer_5k.extra_value_required: White-glove onboarding with bespoke integration to our contact/booking workflow, guaranteed service levels and a short performance commitment (e.g., milestone-based refunds or performance pricing)
non_negotiables: Swiss/GDPR-compliant data hosting and clear privacy controls
References from comparable luxury alpine or serviced-apartment properties
Seamless handoff of weekly actions into our small team's processes (not just alerts)

Data privacy or hosting outside Swiss/EU compliance expectations
Model errors that produce inappropriate or non-luxury messaging
remaining_blockers: Owner sign-off on OPEX vs demonstrable revenue uplift
Integration complexity with our bespoke contact-only booking flow
Need for Swiss/luxury references and a short trial with clear success metrics

module_c.deal_killer: No credible proof that the platform drives incremental direct bookings/revenue within a short trial period (3–6 months).

proof_metric.minimum_credible_improvement: 10% increase in direct booking revenue (or +5 percentage points in direct booking share)

resistance.main_reason: Monthly cost exceeds practical budget for a 49-room regional premium hotel
